name: ANNOUNCEMENT (via DSCC)
subject: LIMITED-TIME OFFER: Black Friday tote bag discount!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Black Friday deal extended: a special discount on our "Insist. Persist. Resist." totebag, just in time for the holidays!
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/last-chance-tote?refcode=DPE-20171125-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team --

For the next 48 hours, we're announcing an amazing deal: Your chance to get our limited-edition Insist. Persist. Resist. tote bag for just $27!

[**Pitch in $27 or more right now to take advantage of this limited-time offer before our Black Friday deal runs out (free shipping included!) >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/last-chance-tote?refcode=DPE-20171125-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/last-chance-tote?refcode=DPE-20171125-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Trust us: you won't want to miss out on the chance to carry this bold motto of the resistance wherever you go. Best of all, your tote bag purchase supports all our efforts to elect Senate Democrats.

It's also the perfect holiday gift for the Democrats in your life -- and all totes will arrive by 12/25.

**Contribute $27 or more right now to order your Insist. Persist. Resist. tote bag. Hurry before this deal ends!**

[**http://www.dscc.org/last-chance-tote**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/last-chance-tote?refcode=DPE-20171125-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thanks,

Team DSCC

[**P.S. Already ordered a tote bag? Your tote is on its way -- and in the meantime, you can use this link to order an additional tote bag for a friend >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/last-chance-tote?refcode=DPE-20171125-Announcement_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d3bb/2b07114c/c242aad6/7318aa0e/397287892/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d3bb/2b07114c/c242aad6/7318aa09/397287892/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d3bb/2b07114c/c242aad6/7318aa08/397287892/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: LAST CHANCE: 🍳
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
This is your last chance to win breakfast with President Trump... |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=94a0454f0946b5fbe8c0b8800f26c6bbe6232239eeb47958c9eaf4ef161364847c260823a63fe81a2ce9f1a705ed834c)
---

Peter,

This is your last chance to meet President Trump during his historic inaugural year, and he'd love the chance to meet you.

---
| **Breakfast with President Trump** Email: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=94a0454f0946b5fbadc76e5950c4550c88325be3feda6b1c8d8f11b23e62253cdbfd5a59a8e581ce317a03007649344a)**
When: December 2, 2017
Entry: **_PENDING_**
Deadline: 11:59 PM TOMORROW ******[**ENTER TO WIN**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=94a0454f0946b5fb4a08baaf4329b5e777f6cd08ac97382a522f320819905b191db1be759b8ae7fb1fc84b4353618837)******
**[Please make a contribution of $3 to help us advance our America First Agenda -- and you'll be automatically entered to win.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=94a0454f0946b5fbba67b08ca099104d6944063dd73eb14830c4b57d5897f2aefb1fe9ce5d7900260af1887fdc1a8272)**
[CONTRIBUTE $3](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=94a0454f0946b5fb5b8e406ee5b95edd0cef7ae2b54927504d69187439d391374eb25c6937b6b0f73a68caf39751d0c7)
This is a once-in-a-lifetime chance to meet President Trump for breakfast in his home city of New York on December 2.

**Don 't miss the deadline, Peter! **

**[Contribute $3 to be automatically entered to win.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=94a0454f0946b5fb391d888b0b5f84bf85ed903e6d2f71bf5f651ba1caee0640c29aa487d75587abe6705032792d27f4 "text_bottom_nd")**
Good luck!

Team TRUMP

**[P.S. - This is the last sweepstakes of the President's inaugural year and he'd love the chance to meet a top supporter like you. Enter to win HERE.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5cdb69073a7b731ec59fc01dcd150b8623b47ea1843124a7d64b8ca84bbecf9db3c2c9f7eca777cdc5d15785a7ed5c63)**

[ENTER TO WIN](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5cdb69073a7b731eee2e5b9c7859294f79f57bf222a446bb857cd3eef9288d88ec45b6a8ffbb4edb63cdf648ee915450)
---

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5cdb69073a7b731e8250f5d6900f5fa5af8cb923c9b8761311c426b246be7efe3356828ae53e2f932c5680909315952f) Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5cdb69073a7b731e75b46d6cb4b5950232a6ccb1dede198be8a55587a7d363824c9b762959b67ba3549df7d2ef0bce2e) Entries must be received between November 8, 2017 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and November 27, 2017 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winners will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations and tickets to attend the December 2, 2017 Holiday In Manhattan Breakfast in New York, NY(approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5cdb69073a7b731ee58de06151ed58e15116199c543f062ce4d18e0ef41606d215de7d784e0db33a96f4dfea2dba772a) for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915. Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5cdb69073a7b731e868459e172275facbe0dac85184668d990dab20f1ed0ebd5e735f48d536b8e307a3240cf91b15a22) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab955ff9c987218fe72e93f98e1b632aa511156a1485bbadbd8136add6b5b481acb34000b55bf212f4) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d484603d9a91b27edb15cf8b1c55857b0e1020c609eac9b53035e)
---

name: battleground-update@dscc.org
subject: No one thought this was possible (AL Senate)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Republicans are panicking about Alabama: Nate Silver's _538_ is calling the race TIED and a new _Fox News_ poll shows Doug Jones in the lead. Now, we have to keep up the momentum.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171126-Battleground_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Republicans are panicking about Alabama.

Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ says the race is "tied" and a recent _Fox News_ poll even shows Doug Jones in the lead against Roy Moore.

Still, Alabama hasn't elected a Democratic Senator in more than 20 years and anything can happen between now and Election Day. That's why it's so critical that supporters like you step up right now to help Doug finish this race strong.

**[Doug needs your support to help keep up the momentum in Alabama. Pitch in $1 right now to fund our efforts as we fight for every state.](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171126-Battleground_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Pundits thought there was no way Democrats could make this race competitive, but thanks to supporters like you, Doug is giving Roy Moore the fight of his life.

Now, if enough people step up before Election Day, we can overcome the odds and give Doug the strong finish no one thought possible.

That's where you come in. Can Doug count on you?

**Contribute $1 right now to help Doug finish strong in Alabama and fund our efforts to take on Republicans EVERYWHERE:

[http://www.dscc.org/fight-everywhere](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-on-republicans-everywhere?refcode=DPE-20171126-Battleground_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d243/2b07114c/c2ea6426/7318953e/749292371/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d243/2b07114c/c2ea6426/73189539/749292371/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d243/2b07114c/c2ea6426/73189538/749292371/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
